{{Quote|Twelve, ''Pride'' is bad.|[[Pash Cracken]]|<ref name="WG" />}}
'''''Contruum's Pride''''' was a medium-sized [[Transport/Legends|transport]] that saw service with the fleet of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. In response to Zsinj's probe of the [[Pyria system]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] sent [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to attack ''[[Vengeance Derra IV]]'', the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] which attempted to breach [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]]' defenses. They found ''Vengeance'' being resupplied by ''Contruum's Pride'' in orbit of [[Mrisst/Legends|Mrisst]].<ref name="WG" />

Rogue [[Pash Cracken]] was able to identify ''Pride'' as falsely named due to her violation of traditional [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]] naming conventions, and the squadron attacked. ''Contruum's Pride'' was damaged in the attack, all of her [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] were destroyed, and she had to cease fighting and use her [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] to save ''Vengeance Derra IV'' from burning up in Mrisst's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]].<ref name="WG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble (unabridged audiobook)}}
